statement.markdown:
heading: ## Create a Scroll Progress Bar
Create a progress bar that fills up as the user scrolls down the page. The progress bar should be a horizontal bar that changes width as the user scrolls.
requirements
The progress bar should be visible at the top of the page
The progress bar should change width as the user scrolls down the page
The progress bar should not exceed the width of the page
The progress bar should be styled with Tailwind CSS classes
The progress bar should be responsive and work on different screen sizes

starterCode.javascript:
const progressBar = document.querySelector('.progress-bar');
// Your JavaScript code here
